# Seen By Many — AI-Powered Advertising Agency

> Seen By Many is a pay-per-result AI advertising agency. We generate new customers for businesses — they only pay for results. No retainers. No risk.

## About
- Founded by Daniel Hristov
- Specializes in Meta, Google, TikTok, and YouTube advertising
- Uses AI-powered ad creative iteration and competitor intelligence
- Charges per qualified lead/customer delivered, not retainers or % of revenue

## Blog Topics
This blog covers: performance marketing, AI advertising, e-commerce growth, paid social strategy, customer acquisition, ROAS optimization, ad creative best practices, lead generation, and scaling ad spend.

## Services
- AI-powered ad creative generation and testing
- Multi-platform media buying (Meta, Google, TikTok, YouTube)
- Full-funnel customer acquisition
- Pay-per-result pricing model
- Competitor intelligence and market analysis

## Contact
Website: https://seenbymany.com
